_doc: MMA fighter photo memory map. Key = fighterSlug(name) (lowercase, diacritics folded, non-alnum -> '-'). Value: { url } direct image URL, OR { sofascore_id } -> served via https://sports.bzzoiro.com/img/team/{id}/ (clean Sofascore headshot cutout). Resolution order in mmaService.getFighterPhoto: this map first, then Oktagon JSON-LD, Wikipedia, Bright Data SERP (env-gated). Seed new fighters here for guaranteed/curated coverage. Verified entries below.
